title: Verify the new sign-in activity and secure the account if unauthorized.
description: To prevent potential unauthorized access to the account.

title: Review active sessions and passkeys associated with the GitHub account.
description: To ensure the security of the GitHub account after the linking of a new identity.

title: Coordinate with neighbors to prepare the house for Air Bnb by April 1st.

title: Post a notice in the local community about the lost items and the reward offered.
description: A public notice may increase the chances of someone returning the items.

title: Update billing details for Cloudflare account to enable auto-renewal.
description: To prevent the domain from expiring on Mon, Apr 6th, 2026.

title: Check the updated data for accuracy and relevance.
